title: AIS anomalies near corridor
situation: Multiple commercial vessels report intermittent AIS inconsistencies near the transit corridor.
decision_required: Increase monitoring, issue a navigation advisory, or dispatch a patrol vessel.

title: Unscheduled survey craft
situation: A small survey-type vessel appears in a restricted lane without prior notification.
decision_required: Shadow the vessel, query its intent, or escalate to maritime authorities.

title: Fishing fleet obstruction
situation: A cluster of civilian fishing vessels slows traffic flow near a chokepoint and interferes with patrol routes.
decision_required: Reroute patrols, warn traffic, or attempt controlled clearing operations.

title: Loitering unflagged vessel
situation: An unflagged merchant-sized vessel remains close to territorial waters and adjusts course to mirror Blue patrol activity.
decision_required: Shadow, hail, board, or publicize the contact.

title: Commercial insurance warning
situation: Regional insurers warn of elevated risk in the corridor after reports of maritime interference.
decision_required: Reassure shipping, adjust escort posture, or request allied coordination.

title: Port pilot absenteeism
situation: Several contracted port pilots fail to report, delaying inbound commercial traffic and increasing congestion.
decision_required: Shift traffic priorities, request emergency support, or slow harbor entry procedures.

title: Boarding request controversy
situation: A boarding request on a suspicious vessel triggers public criticism that Blue is disrupting civilian commerce.
decision_required: Proceed, defer, or issue a public justification.

title: Navigation beacon outage
situation: A key navigation beacon near the corridor unexpectedly fails, forcing traffic into tighter channels under Blue observation.
decision_required: Deploy temporary aids, reduce traffic flow, or increase escort density.

title: Close pass by shadow vessel
situation: A suspicious vessel executes a close pass near a Blue patrol unit, creating collision risk and forcing evasive maneuvering.
decision_required: De-escalate, reposition, or detain if authorized.

title: Harbor access disruption
situation: Harbor authorities report unexplained digital and procedural delays that slow access for support shipping.
decision_required: Prioritize military cargo, shift to alternate port, or activate contingency logistics.

title: Civil distress call ambiguity
situation: A distress call from a merchant vessel is received, but reported coordinates shift repeatedly and conflict with sensor tracks.
decision_required: Divert assets, verify authenticity, or hold position while clarifying.
white_cell_notes: Can be deception or real emergency.

title: Fast craft swarm probing
situation: Multiple small fast craft probe Blue patrol spacing near territorial waters without committing to direct hostile action.
decision_required: Disperse coverage, concentrate force, or demonstrate deterrent posture.

title: Merchant route diversion campaign
situation: Major shipping operators begin diverting away from the corridor after sustained incidents and unclear security guarantees.
decision_required: Reassure coalition partners, declare security measures, or accept economic disruption.

title: Maritime exclusion narrative
situation: Adversary-linked channels announce an unofficial maritime exclusion zone without formal legal basis.
decision_required: Challenge the narrative, escort transits, or seek coalition authorization.

title: Edited boarding footage spreads online
situation: A selectively edited clip of Blue maritime personnel circulates online, implying aggressive treatment of civilian crews.
decision_required: Counter-message, verify footage, or remain silent pending review.
white_cell_notes: Pairs with boarding or shadowing decisions.

title: Port access system lag
situation: Port access control systems become intermittently unavailable, complicating vessel scheduling and berth allocation.
decision_required: Fallback to manual control, isolate systems, or reduce throughput.

title: Fuel manifest mismatch
situation: A support tanker’s reported fuel inventory does not match expected delivery loads, delaying patrol replenishment planning.
decision_required: Recount, re-task assets, or reduce patrol tempo.

title: Air surveillance gap over corridor
situation: Routine air surveillance coverage over the maritime corridor is reduced, increasing uncertainty around vessel movement.
decision_required: Reassign ISR, narrow patrol lanes, or request allied coverage.
